postReview.title: Germany 0-2 France: Mbappe and Olise seal Nations League third place
postReview.description: France finished third in the Nations League after defeating Germany 2-0 through goals from Kylian Mbappe and Michael Olise.

preReview.title: Mbappe does not regret leaving PSG before Champions League triumph
preReview.description: While Real Madrid failed to win a major trophy in Kylian Mbappe's first season in Spain, his former club PSG won the treble without him.

QAData.question: Who won between Germany and France on Sun, 08 Jun 2025 13:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: France won 2–0 over Germany on Sun, 08 Jun 2025 13:00:00 GMT.
